Text: #G08# As a Publisher, I want to store my data quickly and easily online.

Benefit: it be more findable and therefore useful

Text: #G08# As a research publisher, I want validate my data with a minimum of clicks, so that I can feel trust in the validity and usefulness of the data.
Benefit: I can feel trust in the validity and usefulness of the data

Text: #G08# As a publisher, I want to be able to check that every time I update my data it is still good, so that I can catch errors early and store reliable data.
Benefit: I can catch error early and store reliable data

Text: #G08# As a developer wrangler, I want to use a command line tool that allows met to validate data, so that I can feel trust in the validity and usefulness of the data quickly and in the context of my command line workflow.
Benefit: I can feel trust in the validity and usefulness of the data quickly and in the context of my command line workflow

Text: #G08# As a developer, I want an online service that is connected to my data repository that validates data on update, so that I can delegate data validation to a third party.
Benefit: I can delegate data validation to a third party

Text: #G08# As a government Publisher, I want to make it easy to prove that our published data is valid, so that I can claim that we are living up to our transparency commitments.
Benefit: I can claim that we be live up to our transparency commitment

Benefit: I can make sure that government be live up to its transparency commitment

Text: #G08# As a publisher, I want to embed an interactive preview of my data on my site, so that users can be encouraged that this is the correct data for them.

Benefit: user can preview the data and be encourage that this be the correct data for they

Text: #G08# As a Publisher, I want to know how many users have previewed a dataset, so that I know how interest in a dataset relates to its actual download numbers.
Benefit: I know how interest in a dataset relate to its actual download number
